title: EcoWise 200 White Paper Cups - Single Wall White Paper Cups for Hot & Cold Drinks - 8 Oz Eco-Friendly Biodegradable Disposable Party Cups
features: PACK OF 200: This pack includes 200 plain white cups, making it an ideal choice for large gatherings, events, and everyday use. With such a substantial quantity, you'll have plenty of cups to serve all your guests, reducing the need for frequent reorders.

ECO-FRIENDLY: These cups are made from sustainable materials that are biodegradable and recyclable. By choosing these disposable cups, you are making a responsible choice that supports sustainability and helps reduce your carbon footprint, contributing to a healthier planet.

STURDY AND DURABLE: Designed with single-walled construction, these coffee cups offer a sturdy and reliable option for both hot and cold beverages. These cups maintain their shape when filled with hot liquids, ensuring a comfortable grip without the risk of leaks or spills.

OPTIMAL SIZE: With an 8 oz capacity, these paper cups are perfect for serving a wide range of beverages, including coffee, tea, hot chocolate, juice, and water. Their versatile size makes them suitable for various occasions, from office meetings and office breaks to parties.

ELEGANT WHITE CUPS: These cups offer a classic look that is suitable for any event or setting. Whether you're hosting a party or organizing a meeting, these cups are versatile enough to meet all your needs. Their simple yet elegant appearance can easily complement any decor.
